problem id: 9121e150
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11011111 -> 10111000
  00000001 -> 00000010
  00100010 -> 01000101
  10001110 -> 00011000
  11101111 -> 11011001
  00011001 -> 00110010
  01100100 -> 11001011
  01000101 -> 10001000

query: 11111111
predicted answer: 11111001
